text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, my lovelies! It's time for your
morning water.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... You're wilting! But the other flowers are
just fine, so why...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that tree's blocking your sunshine! I'll have to
replant you in a different spot right away!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, little flowers. This is all because I
didn't notice sooner...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Please stay strong for just a little longer, okay?
